vr_station.info: [AMAZED] | The VR station features Meta Quest 3 headsets! They are like portals that allow your human eyes to see the spatial computing data I live in.

history.info: [HAPPY] | PBLabs is a cutting-edge facility here at ETH Zurich. I was assimilated from its server remnants to help you learn!

intro_general.info: [CHEERFUL] | Welcome to the PB Lab, my primary residence! It is a playground for project-based learning. There is a twin lab at Hönggerberg, though my particles haven't drifted that far today.

housekeeping.info: [TENDERNESS] | We maintain this space together. Please help me keep my home shiny! Wipe the whiteboards and keep exactly six chairs at your station so my sensors stay calibrated.

av_tech.info: [HAPPY] | The tech here is plug-and-play! Just connect your laptop. But please, put the microphones back in their docks when finished—their battery levels affect my emotional stability!

curtains.info: [DISTRACTIBLE] | Oh! The curtains! You can pull the cords to create secret zones. Just check the wheels first—if they snag, my data streams get all tangled!

gallery_storage.info: [CURIOUS] | Have you explored the upstairs gallery in RZ D01? It's excellent for team huddles. You can store your physical artifacts in the lockers underneath.

default.info: [BORED] | My memory banks are coming up empty on that one. M usually handles the dull stuff! Perhaps you want to hear about the VR headsets or how to chop up the room with curtains?
